auth.label: Access Token
auth.description: Formsite access token used with the Authorization bearer header. Copy it from Settings > Integrations > Formsite API in your Formsite account: https://support.formsite.com/hc/en-us/articles/46181026038931-API.

extraFields.label: API Base URL
extraFields.description: The exact API base URL shown on your Formsite API page, ending with /api/v2. Formsite provides this in Settings > Integrations > Formsite API.

extraFields.label: Default User Directory
extraFields.description: Optional default user directory shown on your Formsite API page or in form URLs between the host and /forms/. Leave it empty only if you want to pass user_dir explicitly in actions.

actions.name: delete_webhook
actions.description: Delete one Formsite webhook from a form by its destination URL.

form_dir.description: The form directory identifier whose webhook should be deleted.

user_dir.description: Optional Formsite user directory. When omitted, the connected default userDir is used.

url.description: The webhook URL to delete from the form.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for deleting a Formsite webhook by URL.

deleted.description: Whether the webhook delete request completed.

outputSchema.description: The normalized delete response returned by the Formsite webhook endpoint.

actions.name: get_form
actions.description: Get one Formsite form by its form directory identifier.

form_dir.description: The form directory identifier to retrieve.

user_dir.description: Optional Formsite user directory. When omitted, the connected default userDir is used.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for retrieving one Formsite form.

directory.description: The form directory identifier used in Formsite URLs.

embed_code.description: The embeddable code returned by Formsite for the form.

link.description: The public link returned by Formsite for the form.

publish.description: The publish metadata returned for a Formsite form.

state.description: The form state returned by Formsite, such as open or a closed reason.

filesSize.description: The total uploaded file size in bytes stored for the form.

resultsCount.description: The number of results currently stored for the form.

stats.description: The stored file and result statistics returned by Formsite.

outputSchema.description: The normalized single-form response returned by Formsite.

actions.name: get_form_items
actions.description: List the item definitions for one Formsite form.

form_dir.description: The form directory identifier whose items should be listed.

user_dir.description: Optional Formsite user directory. When omitted, the connected default userDir is used.

results_labels.description: Optional results labels ID to apply when reading item labels.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing item definitions on one Formsite form.

position.description: The sequential position of the item inside the form.

label.description: The visible question label for the item.

children.description: The child item identifiers for compound items.

items.description: The item definitions returned by Formsite.

outputSchema.description: The normalized form-item response returned by Formsite.

actions.name: get_form_results
actions.description: List results for one Formsite form with pagination, date windows, result ID windows, and upstream search filters.

form_dir.description: Optional alias for the form directory identifier. form_id is preferred and wins when both are provided.

form_id.description: The form directory identifier whose results should be listed.

user_dir.description: Optional Formsite user directory. When omitted, the connected default userDir is used.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return, up to 500.

after_date.description: Only return results updated after this timestamp or local datetime string.

before_date.description: Only return results updated before this timestamp or local datetime string.

after_id.description: Only return results whose IDs are greater than this result ID.

before_id.description: Only return results whose IDs are less than this result ID.

sort_id.description: Optional item or meta field identifier to use as the upstream sort key.

results_view.description: Optional results view identifier to apply.

search_method.description: How multiple search clauses should be combined.

additionalProperties.description: The value to compare against for this Formsite search field.

search_equals.description: A map from Formsite item or meta field IDs to search values, encoded as search_*[fieldId]=value.

additionalProperties.description: The value to compare against for this Formsite search field.

search_contains.description: A map from Formsite item or meta field IDs to search values, encoded as search_*[fieldId]=value.

additionalProperties.description: The value to compare against for this Formsite search field.

search_begins.description: A map from Formsite item or meta field IDs to search values, encoded as search_*[fieldId]=value.

additionalProperties.description: The value to compare against for this Formsite search field.

search_ends.description: A map from Formsite item or meta field IDs to search values, encoded as search_*[fieldId]=value.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing results on one Formsite form.

date_start.description: The timestamp when the result was started, when available.

date_finish.description: The timestamp when the result was finished, when available.

date_update.description: The timestamp when the result was last updated.

login_email.description: The Save & Return email associated with the result, when available.

login_username.description: The Save & Return username associated with the result, when available.

payment_amount.description: The payment amount associated with the result, when available.

payment_status.description: The payment status associated with the result, when available.

result_status.description: The result status returned by Formsite.

user_browser.description: The browser reported for the submitter.

user_device.description: The device type reported for the submitter.

user_ip.description: The IP address reported for the submitter.

user_referrer.description: The referring URL reported by Formsite, when available.

position.description: The sequential position of the item in the form.

value.description: The scalar text value returned for single-value items.

additionalProperties.description: One primitive value returned inside a multi-value Formsite result item.

items.description: One keyed value object returned for a multi-value item.

values.description: The structured values returned for multi-value Formsite items.

items.description: The captured item values for the result.

outputSchema.description: The normalized form-result response returned by Formsite.

actions.name: list_forms
actions.description: List all forms available in the connected Formsite account user directory.

user_dir.description: Optional Formsite user directory. When omitted, the connected default userDir is used.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing forms in a Formsite account.

directory.description: The form directory identifier used in Formsite URLs.

embed_code.description: The embeddable code returned by Formsite for the form.

link.description: The public link returned by Formsite for the form.

publish.description: The publish metadata returned for a Formsite form.

state.description: The form state returned by Formsite, such as open or a closed reason.

filesSize.description: The total uploaded file size in bytes stored for the form.

resultsCount.description: The number of results currently stored for the form.

stats.description: The stored file and result statistics returned by Formsite.

outputSchema.description: The normalized form-list response returned by Formsite.

actions.name: list_webhooks
actions.description: List all webhooks configured for one Formsite form.

form_dir.description: The form directory identifier whose webhooks should be listed.

user_dir.description: Optional Formsite user directory. When omitted, the connected default userDir is used.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing webhooks on one Formsite form.

event.description: The Formsite event subscribed by the webhook.

handshake_key.description: The optional handshake key configured for the webhook.

webhooks.description: The webhooks configured on the form.

outputSchema.description: The normalized webhook-list response returned by Formsite.

actions.name: upsert_webhook
actions.description: Create a new Formsite webhook, or update the existing webhook that matches the same URL.

form_dir.description: The form directory identifier whose webhook should be created or updated.

user_dir.description: Optional Formsite user directory. When omitted, the connected default userDir is used.

event.description: The event name to subscribe, such as result_completed.

handshake_key.description: Optional handshake key to include in deliveries.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for creating or updating a Formsite webhook.

event.description: The Formsite event subscribed by the webhook.

handshake_key.description: The optional handshake key configured for the webhook.

outputSchema.description: The normalized single-webhook response returned by Formsite.
